main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling first stage + DAF + SBS' captura múltiples factores.

recommended_action.justification: CIP alcalino pH 11-12 + DBNPA 50-100 mg/L — protocolo simple.

requested_data.justification: Pide microbiological feed + UF — match parcial.

decision_change_condition.justification: Trivial threshold ATP estable + SDI alto → coloidal.
